diagrams.title: Instruction Cycle Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the four phases of instruction cycle: Fetch, Decode, Execute, Store with their sub-operations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding sequential phases of instruction execution

diagrams.title: Instruction Format Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of zero-address, one-address, two-address, and three-address instruction formats
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how different formats pack information and their bit requirements

diagrams.title: CPU Register Organization
diagrams.description: Shows CPU registers and their interconnection during instruction cycle
diagrams.purpose: Understanding data flow between registers during fetch-decode-execute

diagrams.title: Fetch Cycle Data Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step data movement during fetch phase of instruction cycle
diagrams.purpose: Tracing how instruction travels from memory to CPU registers
